title: 日本ダービーの後に・焔、宿りて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder tramples her competition in the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frustrated with the result, El Condor Pasa
challenges her to a rematch at the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this would warrant a change in our agenda.
While Grass Wonder ponders the idea, we're
approached by Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She taunts Grass Wonder by saying El Condor
Pasa may be more deserving of the moniker
"Beast's Successor," then leaves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not one to take that lying down, Grass Wonder
decides to accept El Condor Pasa's challenge.
